<!--
Thanks for contributing to NudgeBee docs! Please fill out the sections
below. Remove any that aren't relevant to your change.
-->

## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why. Link related issues
(e.g., `Closes #123`).

## Type of change

- [ ] Typo / minor wording fix
- [ ] New documentation page
- [ ] Update to existing documentation
- [ ] Build, CI, or tooling change
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `npm run build` locally and the site builds without errors
- [ ] I ran `npm run lint` locally and lint passes
- [ ] Internal links work; new external links open the correct page
- [ ] My commits are signed off (DCO — `git commit -s`)
- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)

## Screenshots (if visual changes)

<!-- Drag and drop screenshots here, or remove this section. -->

## Additional notes

Anything reviewers should know — tradeoffs, follow-ups, things you
considered and rejected.
